title: FPS Modpack
description:
Minimal modpack optimized for improving game performance. 

Includes only essential mods to boost FPS and reduce system load while maintaining stability and smooth gameplay.
body:
### Benchmark

FPS Benchmark

| Test            | Avg FPS | Min FPS | Max FPS |
|-----------------|---------|---------|---------|
| FPS Modpack     | 1053    | 708     | 1593    |
| Minecraft Vanilla | 411     | 320     | 569     |

### System Setup

Here’s the system setup I used for this benchmark:

| Component        | Specification                     |
|------------------|-----------------------------------|
| **OS**           | Microsoft Windows 11 Pro 24H2     |
| **Motherboard**  | Z370P D3-CF                       |
| **CPU**          | Intel Core i7-9700K               |
| **GPU**          | NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060 3GB       |
| **RAM**          | 32 GB                             |

## Quick Start

1. **Download** the [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app).
2. **Install** the FPS Modpack via "Browse" in the app.
3. **Play** and enjoy optimized performance.

More info in the [**Modrinth Modpack Guide**](https://support.modrinth.com/en/articles/8802250-modpacks-on-modrinth).

## Resources & Downloads
- [**Download Now**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fps/version/latest)
